title: cynometra lenticellata
intro: Cynometra lenticellata, also known as the White Cynometra or White Ceylon Ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae, native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cynometra lenticellata include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are often used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
